# ~~parseHealthStatus()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function parseHealthStatus(payload: unknown): string;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/mcp-response.utility.ts:127](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/mcp-response.utility.ts#L127)

Extracts the `status` string from a health endpoint response.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type      | Description                      |
| --------- | --------- | -------------------------------- |
| `payload` | `unknown` | The parsed health response body. |

## Returns

`string`

The status string (e.g., `"ok"`).

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  Health assertions
now use direct `fetch` against `GET /health` in E2E tests.

## Remarks

Reads `payload.status` via [getStringProperty](../../reflect.utility/functions/getStringProperty.md) and throws
when the field is missing, ensuring tests fail explicitly.

## Throws

If the payload does not contain a valid `status` field.
